message: help me create a bind for my tmux config that I can configure to launch a popup terminal to call the gemini cli from. It should be session specific. That is when I change tmux sessions, I will also have a separate terminal and gemini cli session too. It should  be customisable (easy to change what key launches the bind). You can safely assume it will be prefix + another key

I want the gemini session to already be in the root of whatever git repo I am calling the tmux gemini command from. If no git repo is found, set the working dir to the cwd. Also rename the popup window to GEMINI. Instead of using native tmux popup terminals. I want you to use the floaX tmux plugin. It is in the repo omerxx/tmux-floax on github if you need help.
that didnt seem to work. Revert back to not using floax but still update the window name and set the working directory as intructed
blacklist my .config/zsh/environment.zsh file from being read by any ai related plugins from my neovim config (in lazynvim/ dir). My config builds on top of lazyvim
